description: Agent FS test-data 召回评测集（扩展版，人工标注）

queries.query: 文本替换工具的核心特点是什么
queries.keyword: 核心特点 LLM 只需引用原文 精确偏移量

queries.query: 场景2里两个空格替换成三个的示例在哪
queries.keyword: 这是一个 空格示例 两个空格 替换为三个

queries.query: WordTextReplacer 类定义
queries.keyword: WordTextReplacer Replace BatchReplace

queries.query: ReplaceOperation 里的 OccurrenceIndex 默认值
queries.keyword: OccurrenceIndex = 1

queries.query: ReplaceResult 和 BatchReplaceResult 字段
queries.keyword: ReplaceResult ErrorMessage MatchCount BatchReplaceResult

queries.query: P5 段落 OldText 空格 NewText 三个 的替换流程
queries.keyword: ParagraphId="P5" OldText="空格" NewText="三个"

queries.query: LocateCharInRuns 精确定位算法
queries.keyword: LocateCharInRuns runIndex offsetInRun

queries.query: 跨 Run 替换方法
queries.keyword: ReplaceAcrossRuns preserveFormat

queries.query: 歧义处理里如何替换第2个匹配项
queries.keyword: OccurrenceIndex = 2

queries.query: 批量替换为什么从后向前
queries.keyword: 从后向前替换 SortOperations OrderByDescending

queries.query: 单个替换示例代码
queries.keyword: var replacer = new WordTextReplacer

queries.query: 从 LLM 输出 JSON 解析替换
queries.keyword: JsonConvert.DeserializeObject replacements

queries.query: 详细日志 DebugLog 怎么记录
queries.keyword: DebugLog Add 在段落P5中搜索

queries.query: 位置映射表缓存机制
queries.keyword: _cachedMap LoadPositionMap

queries.query: 中国人身保险业重大疾病经验发生率表（2020）
queries.keyword: 中国人身保险业重大疾病经验发生率表（2020） CI1

queries.query: 文件名 区域 行数 列数 Sheet名称 的表格
queries.keyword: 文件名 区域 行数 列数 Sheet名称

queries.query: 哪个工作表是科目余额表-1
queries.keyword: 科目余额表-1

queries.query: A1:BP263 的表格区域信息
queries.keyword: Range[A1:BP263]

queries.query: 保证系数表及影响样本规模的因素在哪个 sheet
queries.keyword: 保证系数表及影响样本规模的因素 表1314-12

queries.query: 货币资金可供参考实质性程序表（此页不打印）
queries.keyword: 货币资金可供参考实质性程序表（此页不打印）

queries.query: Intertek 报告里 PHONEPE PVT. LTD. 在哪里出现
queries.keyword: PHONEPE PVT. LTD. Buyer

queries.query: GGN QE 124 的授权签字信息
queries.keyword: AUTHORIZED BY ShanthaKumar GGN QE 124

queries.query: NIL DEFECT DETAILS 的记录
queries.keyword: NIL DEFECT DETAILS CARTON ID Device ID

queries.query: INSPECTION REPORT REPORT NUMBER REPORT DATE 的页眉
queries.keyword: INSPECTION REPORT REPORT NUMBER REPORT DATE

queries.query: 31abc 报告里 AUTHORIZED BY 信息
queries.keyword: AUTHORIZED BY ShanthaKumar Intertek India Private Limited

queries.query: 31abc 报告的 BASIC INFORMATION 产品描述
queries.keyword: Sampling Job Result A) BASIC INFORMATION PHONE SMART SPEAKER

queries.query: 31abc 的 NOTE POINTS 和 DEFECT DETAILS
queries.keyword: NOTE POINTS DEFECT DETAILS CARTON ID Device id

queries.query: 31abc 的 DEFECT PICTURES 列表
queries.keyword: DEFECT PICTURES Scratch Master carton damage Stain on product

queries.query: INDIR2506IN00653 报告号在哪
queries.keyword: REPORT NUMBER:INDIR2506IN00653

queries.query: B) WORKMANSHIP 的批次信息表
queries.keyword: B) WORKMANSHIP Batch code Arrival Date

queries.query: RESULT PER WORKING STAGE 的结果
queries.keyword: C) RESULT PER WORKING STAGE Special Attention Point

queries.query: PACKING LIST IS NOT AVAILABLE IN THE TIME OF INSPECTION
queries.keyword: PACKING LIST IS NOT AVAILABLE IN THE TIME OF INSPECTION

queries.query: 11-04-2025 这份 Intertek 报告
queries.keyword: REPORT DATE: 11-04-2025

queries.query: PHONE PAY SMART SPEAKER 的基本信息
queries.keyword: PHONE PAY SMART SPEAKER Sampling Job Result CONFORMED

queries.query: PACKING LIST NOT AVAILABLE AT THE TIME OF INSPECTION
queries.keyword: PACKING LIST NOT AVAILABLE AT THE TIME OF INSPECTION

queries.query: 多个报告里 Report Overall Result CONFORMED 的位置
queries.keyword: Report Overall Result CONFORMED
